    All Classes and Interfaces

    Classes
    Class
    Description
    JavacAstLogInjector
    Concrete Javac AST-level log field injector.
    JavacLogInjector
    Encapsulates the Javac internal API usage for injecting a logger field.
    SigNozLogProcessor
    Annotation processor that injects a private static final SLF4J Logger field into every class annotated with SigNozLog.
